description: Claude Code and agent skill for AI Output Runtime v0.1.

scripts.test:valid: node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/valid-v0.1.md && node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/report-demo.md
scripts.test:invalid: node scripts/aio.mjs validate examples/invalid-html.md && exit 1 || exit 0
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:valid && npm run test:invalid
